name: White Red and Green Cake
recipeIngredient: 18 1/4 ozs Duncan Hines white cake mix (see note)
1 env Dream Whip whipped topping mix
7 1/4 ozs Betty Crocker Fluffy White Frosting Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare two 9-inch round cake pans with cooking spray and flour; set aside.
3. To prepare the batter, combine the cake mix, Dream Whip, and baking powder in a mixing bowl.
4. In another mixing bowl, combine water, egg whites, oil, and vanilla.
5. Mix dry ingredients with wet ingredients just until moistened.
6. Bake for 25 minutes or until golden brown. Cool.
7. Place cake layers, top sides up, in prepared cake pans.
8. Pierce the cake with a large fork at 1/2-inch intervals.
9. To prepare the filling, stir 1 cup of boiling water into each flavor of gelatin in separate bowls for 2 minutes or until dissolved.
10. Carefully pour red gelatin over one cake layer and lime gelatin over the second cake layer.
11. Refrigerate for 3 hours.
12. Dip one cake pan in warm water for 10 seconds; unmold onto a serving plate.
13. Meanwhile, prepare the topping according to package directions.
14. Spread with about 1/4 of the topping over the top of the first cake layer.
15. Unmold the second cake layer and carefully place it on the first layer.
16. Frost the top and sides of the cake with the remaining topping.
17. Refrigerate for 1 hour or until ready to serve.
